model_comparison: Both models provide accurate text-to-speech conversion with good audio quality. The user explicitly requested an 'extremely fast speaking rate'. Model 1 (T1) delivers the lines quickly but retains dramatic pacing and pauses, which slows down the overall delivery significantly compared to a truly 'extreme' speed.
